goal: internship application for a product or business role
resume_text:
Name: Minseo Kim
Education: 3rd-year student in Business Administration at a university in Seoul.
Experience:
- Built a small campus event registration webpage with teammates and coordinated the schedule and copy.
- Completed a marketing analytics course project using survey data and presentation slides.
- Wrote club recruitment posts and weekly newsletter content for a student startup club.
Strengths:
- Comfortable organizing information, writing clearly, and working across teams.
- Interested in product, operations, and business internship roles.
activity_text:
- Student startup club operations lead for one semester; planned events, checked attendance, and gathered feedback after each session.
- Conducted a small user survey for a class project and summarized findings into slides for a final presentation.
- Helped edit portfolio descriptions for two teammates so their project roles and outcomes were easier to understand.
- Used Excel and Google Sheets to clean basic data, organize responses, and prepare charts.
job_posting_text:
Business / Product Operations Intern

Responsibilities
- Support product and operations projects by organizing information and coordinating tasks across internal stakeholders.
- Analyze user feedback and summarize insights in a clear, structured format.
- Prepare documents, slides, and short written updates for the team.

Qualifications
- Strong written communication skills.
- Ability to work with spreadsheets and basic data analysis.
- Interest in product thinking, user problems, and execution details.
- Experience from school projects, clubs, or internships is welcome.

resume_text:
이름: 박서연
학력: 서울 소재 대학교 미디어커뮤니케이션학과 4학년
경험:
- 학과 프로젝트에서 브랜드 SNS 콘텐츠 기획안을 작성했습니다.
- 학생회 홍보팀에서 카드뉴스 문구와 행사 소개 글을 썼습니다.
- 교내 인터뷰 기사 초안을 정리하고 편집한 경험이 있습니다.
강점:
- 짧은 문장을 명확하게 쓰는 편입니다.
- 사용자 반응을 보며 콘텐츠 방향을 조정하는 데 관심이 있습니다.
activity_text:
- 학교 축제 홍보 콘텐츠를 주 2회 업로드하며 반응을 기록했습니다.
- 동아리 모집용 인스타그램 문구를 작성하고 게시물 성과를 비교했습니다.
- 팀 발표 자료의 스토리 흐름과 문장 표현을 다듬는 역할을 맡았습니다.
job_posting_text:
콘텐츠 마케팅 인턴

주요 업무
- SNS 및 디지털 채널용 콘텐츠 아이디어를 기획합니다.
- 게시물 성과와 사용자 반응을 정리하여 간단한 인사이트를 도출합니다.
- 캠페인 관련 문서와 짧은 카피를 작성합니다.

자격 요건
- 글쓰기와 커뮤니케이션 역량이 좋은 분
- 콘텐츠 성과를 수치로 정리할 수 있는 분
- 협업과 일정 관리가 가능한 분

resume_text:
Name: Jiyoon Lee
Education: 4th-year student in Statistics.
Experience:
- Cleaned survey data and built summary charts for a capstone project.
- Supported a student research team by organizing spreadsheets and documenting weekly updates.
- Coordinated team tasks and deadlines during a semester-long analytics project.
activity_text:
- Used Python and spreadsheets for simple data cleaning.
- Presented findings to classmates with slides and written summary notes.
- Helped maintain a shared tracker for deadlines and project status.
job_posting_text:
Data Operations Intern

Responsibilities
- Maintain structured datasets and support recurring reporting tasks.
- Document operational issues and communicate status updates clearly.
- Coordinate across stakeholders to keep execution on track.

Qualifications
- Familiarity with spreadsheets and basic data processing.
- Strong written communication.
- Detail-oriented mindset and reliability.
